Off Calendar Dec-06-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearance by James Demetrios Frangos, Esq. for Plaintiff. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to JAN-28-2014 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. JUDGE CYNTHIA M. LEE; Clerk KCox; Proceedings not reported. (610); after hearing, dismissal on file; matter taken off calendar

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-30-2013 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Dec-03-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE (TRIAL COURT)
Off Calendar Sep-24-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
James D. Frangos, Esq., appearing for plaintiff D & K Construction & Painting Comapny, Inc.
Denis S. Kenny, Esq., appearing for defendant Citiscape Property Management Group, LLC

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE AS TO PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE SEP-06-2013 MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE

Hearing held. The Court orders plaintiff D & K Construction & Painting Comapny, Inc.'s counsel, James D. Frangos, Esq., to pay sanctions in the amount of $1595.00, for failure to appear at the Sep-06-2013 Mandatory Settlement Conference. Sanctions must be paid directly to defendant Citiscape Property Management Group, LLC's counsel, Denis S. Kenny, Esq., by Friday, Sep-27-2013. Judge: Cynthia M. Lee, Clerk: JIRoque, Matter Not Reported. (206)

MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-24-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearance by James Demetrios Frangos, Esq. for Plaintiff; appearance by Denis S. Kenny, Esq. for Defendant. The Order to Show Cause is continued to 2:30 pm today, Sep-24-2013 in Department 206, Presiding Judge's department. Proceedings not reported. (610)

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-13-2013 Continued To Sep-24-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
